prestazioni: Engine: M113 E55 ML (5.4L V8, 32V, supercharged) – Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Supercharger pulley reduction to 2.5" (from stock 2.7") via Kleemann K-45 head unit with upgraded 3.5" inlet and 100mm throttle body for 550+ WHP on 93 octane.

Forced Induction: Hybrid turbocharger upgrade using a Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA with .82 A/R turbine housing and 62mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller. Intercooler upgrade to a custom front-mount setup by CSF Racing with 5.5" thick cores and 3.5" piping for IAT reduction under 10°C at 20psi.

Suspension & Handling: KW Variant 3 coilovers with 8-position adjustable rebound and 12-click compression damping, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars. Polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (Black Series) for subframe, control arms, and differential mounts. StopTech ST-60 big brake kit with 380mm two-piece rotors, 6-piston calipers, and Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: Body Kit: Wald International "Black Bison" widebody conversion with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts. Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with satin clear coat for UV protection and ceramic coating by Gyeon Quartz.

Aero & Lighting: OEM+ AMG Performance Studio rear spoiler (R171-specific) with carbon fiber weave, paired with Depo Racing JDM-style LED taillights and LUX H8 V4 Angel Eyes with 6000K CRI90 bulbs. Front bumper lip replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS unit from RPF Garage, designed for improved airflow to the CSF intercooler.

Wheels & Stance: Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5" ET22 (front) and 19x11" ET15 (rear) in matte bronze, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) from H&R to achieve flush fitment with Wald fender flares. Air Lift Performance 3P management for adjustable ride height with AccuAir ENDO VT ECU.
